verilog_module.module_in_experiment_notice: This is an experimental module. The code is not saved unless the "Save Code" button is clicked.

custom_shortcut.esc_cancel: Press Desire Key Combination & press Enter

tooltips.LSB: LSB ToolTip : The least significant bit or the high-order bit.
tooltips.VariableLed: Variable Led ToolTip: Variable LED inputs an 8 bit value and glows with a proportional intensity.
tooltips.Text: Text ToolTip: Use this to document your circuit.
tooltips.Input: Input ToolTip: Toggle the individual bits by clicking on them.
tooltips.verilogPower: verilogPower ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.Buffer: Buffer ToolTip : Isolate the input from the output.
tooltips.NorGate: Nor Gate ToolTip : Combination of OR gate and NOT gate.
tooltips.Rectangle: Rectangle ToolTip : Used to Box the Circuit or area you want to highlight.
tooltips.Button: Button ToolTip: High(1) when pressed and Low(0) when released.
tooltips.SixteenSegDisplay: Sixteen Display ToolTip: Consists of 16+1 bit inputs.
tooltips.PriorityEncoder: Priority Encoder ToolTip : Compresses binary inputs into a smaller number of outputs.
tooltips.Counter: Counter: a binary counter from zero to a given maximum value
tooltips.Output: Output ToolTip: Simple output element showing output in binary.
tooltips.DigitalLed: Digital Led ToolTip: Digital LED glows high when input is High(1).
tooltips.verilogDivider: verilogDivider ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.MSB: MSB ToolTip : The most significant bit or the high-order bit.
tooltips.SevenSegDisplay: Seven Display ToolTip: Consists of 7+1 single bit inputs.
tooltips.Adder: Adder ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.OrGate: Or Gate ToolTip : Implements logical disjunction
tooltips.NotGate: Not Gate ToolTip : Inverts the input digital signal.
tooltips.verilogMultiplier: verilogMultiplier ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.ConstantVal: Constant ToolTip: Bits are fixed. Double click element to change the bits.
tooltips.NandGate: Nand Gate ToolTip : Combination of AND and NOT gates
tooltips.RGBLed: RGB Led ToolTip: RGB Led inputs 8 bit values for the colors RED, GREEN and BLUE.
tooltips.ImageAnnotation: Image ToolTip: Embed an image in the circuit for annotation
tooltips.BitSelector: BitSelector ToolTip : Divides input bits into several equal-sized groups.
tooltips.XnorGate: Xnor Gate ToolTip : Logical complement of the XOR gate
tooltips.TriState: TriState ToolTip : Effectively removes the output from the circuit.
tooltips.Multiplexer: Multiplexer ToolTip : Multiple inputs and a single line output.
tooltips.Stepper: Stepper ToolTip: Increase/Decrease value by selecting the stepper and using +/- keys.
tooltips.XorGate: Xor Gate ToolTip : Implements an exclusive OR.
tooltips.Decoder: Decoder ToolTip : Converts coded inputs into coded outputs.
tooltips.Flag: FLag ToolTip: Use this for debugging and plotting.
tooltips.Demultiplexer: DeMultiplexer ToolTip : Multiple outputs and a single line input.
tooltips.verilogShiftLeft: verilogShiftLeft ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.HexDisplay: Hex Display ToolTip: Inputs a 4 Bit Hex number and displays it.
tooltips.SquareRGBLed: Square RGB Led ToolTip: RGB Led inputs 8 bit values for the colors RED, GREEN and BLUE.
tooltips.ControlledInverter: Controlled Inverter ToolTip : Controlled buffer and NOT gate.
tooltips.AndGate: And Gate ToolTip : Implements logical conjunction
tooltips.TwoComplement: Two's Complement Tooltip : Calculates the two's complement
tooltips.verilogShiftRight: verilogShiftRight ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
tooltips.Splitter: Splitter ToolTip: Split multiBit Input into smaller bitwidths or vice versa.
tooltips.SRflipFlop: SR FlipFlop ToolTip : SR FlipFlop Selected.
tooltips.JKflipFlop: JK FlipFlop ToolTip : gated SR flip-flop with the addition of a clock input.
tooltips.TflipFlop: T FlipFlop ToolTip :  Changes state / Toggles whenever the clock input is strobed.
tooltips.Dlatch: D Latch : Single input Flip flop or D FlipFlop
tooltips.DflipFlop: D FlipFlop ToolTip : Introduces delay in timing circuit.
